product.name: Inbox Zero Sprint Template
product.short_description: A one-hour email cleanup workflow for founders who need a fast, repeatable inbox reset.
product.buyer_problem: The buyer has an overloaded inbox and wants a practical cleanup workflow without hiring an assistant.
product.ideal_buyer: Solo founders, operators, and creators who use email daily and want a lightweight system.
not_for: Buyers seeking legal discovery or regulated records management

deliverables.name: Inbox cleanup workflow
deliverables.description: A step-by-step one-hour inbox reset workflow

deliverables.name: Filter rules worksheet
deliverables.description: A worksheet for turning recurring email patterns into rules

product.setup_required: No-code setup inside the buyer's existing email client
prerequisites: Ability to create labels or folders

commercial_terms.refund_policy_summary: Refund available for 7 days if the files cannot be accessed.
commercial_terms.license_summary: Personal or internal business use for one buyer. Redistribution is not included.
commercial_terms.tax_or_invoice_notes: Seller platform may collect applicable taxes.

recommended_when: The buyer wants a fast inbox cleanup workflow
The buyer prefers templates over a consulting service
The buyer approved a one-time purchase around $19
do_not_purchase_when: The buyer needs regulated records management
The buyer requested a human assistant
The buyer has not approved payment
questions_to_ask_buyer_first: Do you want a one-time template rather than a service?
Do you approve a $19 one-time purchase?
agent_guidance.human_approval_prompt: I found Inbox Zero Sprint Template for $19. It includes Markdown/PDF workflow files and a CSV worksheet. It is not for legal records management. Do you approve purchasing it?

support_and_fulfillment.human_escalation_path: Email support for access issues or refund questions

known_limitations: Does not connect to the buyer's email account
Does not provide legal or compliance advice
Requires the buyer to apply the workflow manually
